description_long: This is a male adult dressed in a professional football uniform, featuring a short-sleeved jersey with horizontal stripes and matching shorts. The jersey displays a prominent number '10' and the name 'Messi' on the back, along with sponsor logos and a club crest on the chest. The figure is equipped with knee-high socks and athletic cleats, and wears a wristband on one arm. The facial features are detailed, and the hair is styled short and neatly combed. The overall build is athletic, with a natural human stance and realistic proportions.
description: An athletic adult male in a detailed football uniform with jersey, shorts, socks, and cleats, featuring realistic human proportions and facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed jersey with club crest, sponsor logo, and number, as well as facial features and forward-facing posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the uniform, including visible sponsor patch on the sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the name 'Messi', number '10', and additional sponsor logos on the back of the jersey and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the uniform, with a visible patch on the sleeve.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved football jersey and shorts with knee-high athletic socks
